packages.description: .NET library that converts file formats to Markdown for AI pipelines, documentation workflows, and developer tools. Inspired by Python markitdown.
Structured document model for ElBruno.MarkItDotNet ingestion pipelines. Defines Document, Section, Block hierarchy for layout-aware processing.
Excel (.xlsx) to Markdown converter for ElBruno.MarkItDotNet. Converts spreadsheet sheets to Markdown tables.
PowerPoint (.pptx) to Markdown converter for ElBruno.MarkItDotNet. Converts slides and speaker notes to Markdown.
A .NET library to download files (ONNX models, tokenizers, voice presets, etc.) from Hugging Face Hub repositories with progress reporting, caching, and authentication support.
AI-powered converters for ElBruno.MarkItDotNet using IChatClient. Provides OCR, image captioning, and audio transcription.
Local embedding generation using Microsoft.Extensions.AI and ONNX Runtime
Run Qwen3-TTS text-to-speech locally from C# using ONNX Runtime. Models download automatically from HuggingFace on first run.

A .NET library for local text-to-image generation using Stable Diffusion and ONNX Runtime. Supports multiple models (SD 1.5, LCM Dreamshaper) with automatic model download from HuggingFace and native C# inference — no Python dependency.
NVIDIA CUDA GPU acceleration for ElBruno.Text2Image. Install this package instead of ElBruno.Text2Image to enable CUDA-based inference for Stable Diffusion image generation on NVIDIA GPUs.

Microsoft Foundry cloud image generation for ElBruno.Text2Image. Provides FLUX.2 and MAI-Image-2 text-to-image generation via the Microsoft Foundry REST API. No local models needed — runs in the cloud.

DirectML GPU acceleration for ElBruno.Text2Image. Install this package instead of ElBruno.Text2Image to enable DirectML-based inference for Stable Diffusion image generation on AMD, Intel, and NVIDIA GPUs (Windows only).
Windows systray monitor for Foundry Local — model load/unload notifications, mini status window
CPU runtime for ElBruno.Text2Image. Includes all text-to-image generation functionality with CPU-based inference via ONNX Runtime. Install this for environments without a GPU.
SQLite backend for MemPalace.NET with managed BLOB vector storage and cosine similarity search.
AI-powered knowledge graph builder for codebases
Local LLM chat completions using Microsoft.Extensions.AI and ONNX Runtime GenAI. IChatClient implementation for running LLMs locally.
Core domain types and storage interfaces for MemPalace.NET — local-first AI memory with wings/rooms/drawers hierarchy.
A .NET library for VibeVoice text-to-speech using ONNX Runtime. Supports automatic model download from HuggingFace, voice presets, and native C# inference with no Python dependency.

Cross-platform CLI for AI text-to-image generation. Supports FLUX.2, MAI-Image-2 (Microsoft Foundry), GPT-Image-1.5, and GPT-Image-2 (Azure OpenAI). Lightweight cloud-first design (~30 MB). For local CPU/GPU inference, see ElBruno.Text2Image.Cli.Full.
Temporal knowledge graph for MemPalace.NET with entity-relationship triples and validity windows.
Kernel Memory integration for ElBruno.LocalEmbeddings — provides ITextEmbeddingGenerator adapter and KernelMemoryBuilder extensions
Microsoft.Extensions.VectorData integration for ElBruno.LocalEmbeddings
CLIP-based image embedding generation using ONNX Runtime for local multimodal search and RAG scenarios
Windows tray timeline app for presenters to stay on track during talks, demos, and recordings.
Local Whisper speech-to-text using ONNX Runtime. Auto-downloads models from HuggingFace and supports WAV plus raw PCM stream, byte, and float inputs.
Model downloader for ElBruno.LocalEmbeddings.ImageEmbeddings

Core abstractions for real-time audio conversation in .NET. Provides ITextToSpeechClient, IVoiceActivityDetector, and IRealtimeConversationClient interfaces following Microsoft.Extensions.AI patterns. Pluggable providers for STT, TTS, VAD, and LLM.

Windows system tray monitor for Aspire distributed applications. Install as a global tool and launch with `aspiremon`. See your Aspire resources at a glance, pin the ones you care about in a compact mini window with full URLs, and start/stop your AppHost from the tray.
Local audio transcription for ElBruno.MarkItDotNet using OpenAI Whisper via ONNX Runtime. Converts audio files to Markdown transcripts offline.
Windows-first Ollama monitor global tool launcher and configuration CLI.
Microsoft.Extensions.AI integration for MemPalace.NET with ONNX embeddings (ElBruno.LocalEmbeddings) and Ollama/OpenAI support.
Semantic and hybrid search for MemPalace.NET with vector similarity, keyword boosting, and optional reranking.
Voice cloning extension for ElBruno.QwenTTS. Clone any voice from a 3-second audio sample using the Qwen3-TTS Base model with ECAPA-TDNN speaker encoder.
Layout-aware and token-aware chunking for ElBruno.MarkItDotNet ingestion pipelines. Supports heading-based, paragraph-based, and token-aware strategies.
Core abstractions for ElBruno.Speech — audio types, provider contracts, session interfaces, and error types.
Harrier-OSS-v1 embedding model integration for ElBruno.LocalEmbeddings — decoder-only transformer with last-token pooling and 94+ language support
Intel Core Ultra NPU-accelerated local embedding generation using OpenVINO and ONNX Runtime

Silero VAD-based IVoiceActivityDetector implementation for ElBruno.Realtime. Provides local voice activity detection using Silero VAD v5 ONNX model with automatic download. Detects speech segments in continuous audio streams.
Qualcomm Snapdragon X NPU-accelerated local embedding generation using QNN and ONNX Runtime
Microsoft Agent Framework integration for MemPalace.NET with per-agent memory diaries.

Whisper-based ISpeechToTextClient implementation for ElBruno.Realtime. Provides local speech-to-text using Whisper.net with automatic GGML model download. Supports tiny.en (fast) and base.en (accurate) models.
Quality analysis and scoring for ElBruno.MarkItDotNet ingestion pipelines. Detects OCR issues, duplicate content, broken reading order, and guides fallback routing.
Command-line tool for converting files to Markdown. Powered by ElBruno.MarkItDotNet.
Model Context Protocol (MCP) server for MemPalace.NET exposing memory operations as MCP tools.
Benchmark tool for MemPalace.NET testing search quality on LongMemEval and other memory datasets.
Audio primitives for ElBruno.Speech — WAV I/O, PCM conversion, resampling, framing, and ring buffers.
RAG (Retrieval-Augmented Generation) pipeline for ElBruno.LocalLLMs. Provides document chunking, embedding storage, and semantic search.
NPU-accelerated local embedding generation using DirectML and ONNX Runtime
Command-line tool for MemPalace.NET — local-first AI memory with wings/rooms/drawers hierarchy.
Citation tracking and source traceability for ElBruno.MarkItDotNet ingestion pipelines. Provides page, block, and heading-path references for chunks.

C# 14-ready extension library for OllamaSharp that adds configurable timeout support to OllamaApiClient. Provides fluent, builder pattern, and functional configuration styles for managing timeouts in long-running LLM inference operations.
Content ingestion pipeline for MemPalace.NET with filesystem and conversation transcript miners.
Windows-first .NET tool that forwards GitHub Copilot CLI events to the ElBruno.CopilotCLIMonitor systray app.
A .NET CLI tool to download, manage, and inspect cached files from Hugging Face Hub repositories.
Lightweight, zero-dependency BM25 full-text search for .NET. Index millions of documents and search in milliseconds. Perfect for RAG systems, knowledge bases, and hybrid search pipelines.
BitNet 1.58-bit LLM inference using bitnet.cpp. IChatClient implementation for Microsoft.Extensions.AI.
Windows system tray app to toggle taskbar date/time visibility. Context menu + Ctrl+Alt+T hotkey.
A .NET library for semantic reranking of search results using BGE and Claude backends
Hermes.NET: Distributed agent runtime with skills, tools, memory, and observability.
Azure Document Intelligence integration for ElBruno.MarkItDotNet. Provides layout-aware OCR extraction with structured CoreModel output.
Incremental sync and change detection for ElBruno.MarkItDotNet ingestion pipelines. Supports source hashing, chunk diffing, soft-delete, and sync planning.
Semantic routing for Model Context Protocol (MCP) tool definitions using local embeddings. Indexes MCP tools and returns the most relevant tools for a given prompt via vector search.
Azure AI Search integration for ElBruno.MarkItDotNet ingestion pipelines. Provides index schema, document mapping, and batch upload helpers.
Core abstractions for multi-agent orchestration with the Microsoft Agent Framework. Includes agent roles, configuration, IAgentClient interface, session factory, and instruction loading utilities.
Provider-neutral vector record mapping and export for ElBruno.MarkItDotNet ingestion pipelines. Supports Microsoft.Extensions.VectorData abstractions and JSONL export.
Performance diagnostics and SLA validation utilities for MemPalace.NET — percentile calculation, latency tracking, and benchmark reporting.
Metadata extraction and enrichment for ElBruno.MarkItDotNet ingestion pipelines. Provides title, author, language detection, document type tagging, and heading normalization.
AI Testing and Evaluation Toolkit for .NET

A .NET library for running NVIDIA PersonaPlex-7B-v1 full-duplex speech-to-speech locally using ONNX Runtime. Supports automatic model download from HuggingFace, voice presets, persona control, and native C# inference — no Python dependency.
Speech pipeline orchestration for ElBruno.Speech — VAD → STT → LLM → TTS with bounded channels, barge-in, and session management.

Ultralight multi-agent orchestration engine for the Microsoft Agent Framework. Implements a 6-step pipeline (Plan, Parse, Execute, Verify, Review, Report) with event streaming via System.Threading.Channels.
Windows audio I/O for ElBruno.Speech via NAudio — microphone input, speaker output, and device enumeration.
Generate and display QR codes in the console using Unicode block characters. Optimized for terminal output with 2:1 aspect ratio correction. Perfect for CLI tools and terminal applications.
HermesNET distributed agent runtime components.
OpenTelemetry instrumentation for ElBruno.Speech — activities, metrics, and Aspire-compatible setup.
Synthetic data generation for AI evaluation testing in .NET
Fluent API builders for structured QR code payloads: WiFi, vCard, Email, SMS, Geographic coordinates, and URLs.
CLI tool for ElBruno.Speech — devices, transcribe, vad, talk, serve, and benchmark commands.
Adapter package that bridges Foundry Local SDK with Microsoft.Extensions.AI IChatClient for Agent Framework usage.
HermesNET distributed agent runtime components.
ASP.NET Core integration for ElBruno.Speech — WebSocket endpoint, session registry, health checks, and protocol handling.
Silero VAD provider for ElBruno.Speech — ONNX Runtime inference, stateful streaming voice activity detection.
Bridge between ElBruno.QwenTTS and ElBruno.Realtime — provides ITextToSpeechClient adapter and DI extensions for QwenTTS integration with the real-time conversation pipeline.
AOT-friendly source-generator-based DTO mapper for .NET. Core attributes and abstractions.
xUnit integration for ElBruno.AI.Evaluation
Generate QR codes as resolution-independent SVG markup. Perfect for web, email, documents, and print.
Reporting and persistence for ElBruno.AI.Evaluation
Bridge between KokoroSharp and ElBruno.Realtime — provides ITextToSpeechClient adapter and DI extensions for Kokoro TTS integration with the real-time conversation pipeline.
Bridge between ElBruno.VibeVoiceTTS and ElBruno.Realtime — provides ITextToSpeechClient adapter and DI extensions for VibeVoiceTTS integration with the real-time conversation pipeline.
Roslyn incremental source generator for ElBruno.AotMapper. Generates compile-time DTO mapping code.
Entity Framework Core integration for ElBruno.AotMapper. Projection helpers for supported patterns.
Global dotnet tool for command-line QR code generation in console, SVG, PNG, JPEG, ASCII, or PDF formats.
Generate QR codes as ASCII art text. Perfect for legacy terminals, text files, and embedded output.
Core graph extraction, graph modeling, clustering, and export pipeline for graphify-dotnet.
Generate PDF documents with embedded QR codes. Uses PdfSharpCore for cross-platform PDF generation.
Generate QR codes as PNG or JPEG bitmaps using SkiaSharp.
ASP.NET Core integration for ElBruno.AotMapper. DI registration and convenience extensions.
CLI tool for validating skills and generating prompt XML.
Evaluation helpers for conversion quality, completeness, and markdown readiness in ElBruno.MarkItDotNet pipelines.
Core models, parser, validator, and prompt generator for the Agent Skills specification.
Security scanning and policy evaluation helpers for ElBruno.MarkItDotNet pipelines.
